headline: Anthropic launches Project Deal amid Google's $40B investment push
body: Anthropic announced Project Deal while Google committed $40 billion in additional investment, signaling major capital backing for the AI safety-focused company. For healthcare AI specifically, this influx enables Anthropic to accelerate development of more reliable Claude models that could handle sensitive clinical workflows where accuracy and safety are non-negotiable. The focus on agent-based systems and commerce testing suggests tools designed for autonomous decision-making, directly relevant to healthcare organizations exploring AI agents for prior authorization, discharge planning, and EHR integration. Vendors and healthcare systems should monitor Anthropic's roadmap closely as it competes with other large language model providers in clinical AI deployment.
